items.title: Module Federation 2.0 Reaches Stable Release with Wider Support Outside of Webpack
items.summaryShort: Module Federation 2.0 Reaches Stable Release with Wider Support Outside of Webpack. Module Federation 2.0, an open-source micro-frontend mechanism introduced with webpack 5, offers significant updates including dynamic TypeScript type hints

items.summaryShort: Presentation: Panel: Taking Architecture Out of the Echo Chamber. Andrew Harmel-Law and a panel of expert architects discuss the shifting practice of architecture in 2025.

items.title: Lucid blames dip in Q1 sales on seat supplier issue
items.summaryShort: Lucid blames dip in Q1 sales on seat supplier issue. Lucid said it has resolved the problem and is not changing its guidance for 2026.

items.title: The anonymous social app that thinks it can work in Saudi Arabia
items.summaryShort: The anonymous social app that thinks it can work in Saudi Arabia. When Fizz quietly debuted in Saudi Arabia, founder and CEO Teddy Solomon wasn’t expecting the app to catch on like it did.
